response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer with strong testing culture and open-source contributions, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his C++ exposure is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, with his systems work concentrated in DLang and his recent career in TypeScript/Node.js product engineering. He also lacks formal technical-leadership experience managing cloud/DevOps engineers and has limited large-scale compute-platform or cloud-architecture depth beyond one high-throughput microservices role.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and community mentoring via workshops and courses
Broad full-stack and polyglot background with long-running open-source platform ownership (GISCollective on Kubernetes)
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8 years of C++ experience (under 1 year professionally)
No formal technical-lead role leading cloud or DevOps engineers; leadership evidence is informal (workshops, dojos)
Limited production cloud-architecture and compute-platform experience; recent focus is product/web engineering, not infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud platform / technical leadership track record
